name: Dual Cat: Max
author: Poki
description: Dual Cat: Max is the exciting sequel to Dual Cat, bringing more puzzles and adventure! As a clever grey cat, your mission is to rescue your white cat friend from a dangerous lab filled with tricky obstacles. But don't worry—you have a secret power! Switch to spirit mode to become invincible and pass through hazards. Collect batteries to power up, grab the fish, and find the best way to escape each level. Can you master both forms and save your friend? How to play Dual Cat: Max? Move - A/D or Left/Right arrow keys Use/Disable Power - F Restart - R Who created Dual Cat: Max? Dual Cat: Max is created by Seal Unicorn Games. Play our other games on Poki : Misland , Fluffy Out , Dual Cat and Rusher Crusher ! How can I play Dual Cat: Max for free? You can play Dual Cat: Max for free on Poki. Can I play Dual Cat: Max on mobile devices and desktop? Dual Cat: Max can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
